title: Gangster No 1: The Freddie Foreman Story
overview: Attached to almost every unsolved gangland murder in London over the last 50 years, Freddie Foreman is "The Godfather". In this special documentary, Foreman reveals the audacious details of the heists, double crossings, shootouts, murders and betrayals he was involved in and what has made him Gangster No. 1.
